description.value:
A mysterious figure known as the Dark Harper. He visits evacuated villages and leaves them ruined. In reality, he is Carden, a bard who was talented and charismatic, once a Connovii noble. He was transformed into an undead creature by Gla'aki but retains his intelligence and personality. Being undead does not mean he is immortal, but he is not subject to aging. He knows that bright light will bring about his ultimate demise. Unlike other undead, Carden's personality is little changed. He appears totally black, as if made of wrinkled leather, with shoulder-length hair and a short beard. He has better plans but his options are limited. He offers to help the Corniovii against Gla'aki, providing information about Gla'aki's plans and offering multiple plans for investigators to pursue.

Role: ally/antagonist | Occupation: The Dark Harper, undead bard

STR
55		 CON
